Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x46B5 "THECURSEOFSHERWOOD-46B5" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Curse of Sherwood, The.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
The following changes were made to default to joystick and allow the fire button to proceed when keypresses are requested:
1. NOP'd out the STA $5CB0 instruction at $46B9 2. Patched the byte at $5CB0 to $01 3. Patched the LDA $DC01 instruction at $471A to be JSR $C000 instead 4. Added a small routine at $C000 which executes the LDA $DC01 instruction. If the accumulator is not $FF (i.e. there's a key pressed), it returns to carry on the normal code flow. If not, then the code checks if the fire button in port 2 is pressed. If it is, then it returns with the accumulator set to zero, which causes the game to behave as if the required key is pressed. If the fire button is not pressed, the routine sets the accumulator to $FF and returns to carry on the normal code flow. 5. Patched the LDA $DC01 instruction at $1A15 to be JSR $C000 instead - this causes the game to return to the title screen when the fire button in port 2 is pressed during demo mode.
Also zeroed out the following memory ranges as they contained an unnecessary repeating memory block:
$2000 - $4400 $C000 - $D000
